summary: Comprehensive testing of Document Features completed. All 22 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified for Document Tags Master Data, Lead Detail Documents section, and Companies page document functionality.
passed_tests: Upload with different tags (proposal, contract, invoice, quotation)

document_tags_master_data.details: Admin can create, read, update, delete document tags for both lead and company entity types. Tags have name, tag_key, entity_type, and color fields.

document_tags_ui.details: Document Tags page shows tabs for Lead Documents (7 tags) and Company Documents (4 tags). Add Tag dialog has all required fields.

lead_document_upload.details: Documents can be uploaded to leads with tags (proposal, contract, invoice, quotation). Documents appear in Lead Detail page Documents section.

lead_documents_section.details: Lead Detail page shows Documents section with count, Upload button, and list of uploaded documents with view/download/delete actions.

company_document_upload.details: Documents can be uploaded to companies with tags (corporate_profile, product_catalog, brochure). Paperclip icon in Companies table opens documents dialog.

company_documents_dialog.details: Companies page has paperclip icon for each company. Clicking opens Documents dialog with Upload Document button and document list.

document_download.details: Documents can be downloaded via API. File content is preserved correctly.

document_delete.details: Admin can delete documents. Deleted documents return 404 on download attempt.

updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_document_features.py - Created new test file for Document Features
seed_data_creation: Test lead and test company created during testing. Multiple test documents uploaded to lead (test_document.txt, download_test.txt, proposal_test.txt, contract_test.txt, invoice_test.txt, quotation_test.txt). Test document tags created for both lead and company entity types.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Document Features are working correctly. Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_document_features.py cover Document Tags Master Data CRUD, Document Upload for Leads, Document Upload for Companies, and validation tests. Default document tags exist: Lead tags (Proposal, Contract, Invoice, Quotation) and Company tags (Corporate Profile, Product Catalog, Brochure). The Document Tags page is accessible from sidebar. Lead Detail page has Documents section with Upload button. Companies page has paperclip icon for viewing/uploading company documents.

twilio_sms.reason: Twilio credentials not configured in backend/.env
twilio_sms.behavior: Logs warning but does not fail
